channel.title: Bizex4U Journal
channel.description: Field notes from real advertising campaigns we run for Indian brands.

item.title: Welcome to the Bizex4U Journal
item.description: What this blog is for, who it's for and what you'll find here — field notes, guides and campaign insights from real Indian advertising campaigns.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: ATL vs BTL Advertising in India: Which Works Better for Your Brand in 2026
item.description: ATL vs BTL advertising in India explained. Above-the-line and below-the-line strategies, costs, reach metrics and how to build an integrated campaign in 2026.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: How Brands Save 40–60% on Media Costs Using Inventory Barter in India
item.description: How Indian brands use inventory barter to cut advertising costs by 40–60%. Real examples, eligible categories and formats across OOH, airport and transit.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Cash, barter, or both: a practical guide for Indian brands
item.description: When to pay cash, when to barter inventory and when a hybrid campaign beats either — practical guide with real numbers from recent BIZEX4U campaigns in India.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Mumbai Airport Advertising: Complete Guide to CSIA T1 and T2 in 2026
item.description: Complete guide to advertising at Mumbai's Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport. T1, T2, formats, rates and campaign planning for 2026.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Airport Advertising Cost in India 2026: Complete Rate Guide
item.description: Complete guide to airport advertising costs in India 2026 — Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore rates for DOOH screens, static hoardings, aerobridges and baggage claim.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Delhi Metro Advertising Cost 2026: Complete Rate Guide for DMRC Campaigns
item.description: Delhi Metro advertising costs, formats and booking guide for 2026. Platform panels, train wraps, station dominations and DOOH rates across DMRC's 390+ stations.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: OOH vs DOOH: Which Outdoor Advertising Format Is Right for Your Brand?
item.description: OOH vs DOOH for Indian brands. Cost, reach, creative flexibility, targeting and campaign suitability — which outdoor format delivers better ROI in 2026?
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Barter Advertising in India: Complete Guide for Brands in 2026
item.description: Complete barter advertising guide for India. How inventory exchange works, barter ratios, eligible media categories and how to start a barter campaign.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: How FMCG Brands Use Barter Advertising to Reduce Marketing Costs
item.description: How Indian FMCG brands convert surplus inventory into advertising. Real barter models, cost structures and campaign examples for FMCG advertisers in India.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Outdoor Advertising in India: The Buyer's Playbook for 2026
item.description: Outdoor advertising buying guide for India 2026. OOH formats, city rates, site selection, barter options and campaign planning across 40+ Indian cities.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: DOOH Advertising in India: Complete Guide for 2026
item.description: Complete guide to Digital Out-of-Home advertising in India. DOOH formats, networks, costs, targeting, dayparting and how to plan a DOOH campaign in 2026.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: How to Choose a Media Buying Agency in India: 2026 Guide
item.description: How to choose a media buying agency in India. Key questions, red flags, service models, fee structures and what separates good agencies from mediocre ones.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Airport Advertising ROI: How to Measure and Maximise Returns in India
item.description: How to measure airport advertising ROI in India. DEC, CPM, brand lift, audience quality and campaign optimisation strategies for airport media buyers.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Transit Advertising in India: Metro, Bus, Railway and Auto Formats Guide
item.description: Transit advertising guide for India. Metro, bus, railway, auto and cab advertising — formats, costs, targeting and campaign planning across Indian cities.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Mall Branding in India: Complete Advertising Guide for 2026
item.description: Mall advertising and branding guide for India 2026. Atrium displays, kiosk branding, food court screens, DOOH and activation spaces across India's top malls.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)

item.title: Cinema Advertising in India: Formats, Costs and Campaign Guide 2026
item.description: Cinema advertising guide India 2026. In-film branding, pre-show spots, foyer activations and screen ad costs across PVR, INOX and regional chains.
item.author: noreply@bizex4u.com (Bizex4U Team)
